scripts.build: pnpm --filter @cs-demo-analyst/shared-types build && pnpm --filter @cs-demo-analyst/sidecar build && pnpm --filter @cs-demo-analyst/desktop generate
scripts.package: pnpm generate-icons && pnpm build && pnpm build:sidecar && pnpm sync-version && pnpm --filter @cs-demo-analyst/tauri-app tauri build
